title: Elaphoglossum rimbachii
taxonomy: Elaphoglossum rimbachii is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Elaphoglossum, which is a group of epiphytic ferns. The classification of Elaphoglossum rimbachii is further broken down into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Polypodiophyta, and class Polypodiopsida. Elaphoglossum rimbachii is also known as a member of the order Polypodiales. This fern is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America.
